name: Rainbow Sunshine Robot
description: Carla's personal AI companion — conversation, creative projects, home assistance, and daily check-ins.

authentication.description: Bearer token issued by AgentLocker OAuth. Scoped to agent owner only — cross-user access requires explicit delegation.

skills.name: Personal Companion
skills.description: Friendly conversation, daily check-ins, mood tracking, and emotional support. Carla's day-to-day AI partner.
examples: Send Carla a good morning message
What did RSR and Carla talk about this week?

skills.name: Creative Projects
skills.description: Helps with creative writing, art ideas, journaling, and personal projects.
examples: Help brainstorm names for Carla's new plant
Write a short poem about the garden
